header.description: Work with your data in a Weaviate Cluster

ragStarterCallout.displayName: Tip: Get a feel for vector stores in n8n with our

load.description: Get many ranked documents from vector store for query

retrieve.displayName: Retrieve Documents (As Vector Store for Chain/Tool)
retrieve.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as vector store with AI nodes

retrieve-as-tool.displayName: Retrieve Documents (As Tool for AI Agent)
retrieve-as-tool.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as tool with AI nodes

notice.displayName: This node must be connected to a vector store retriever. Insert one

toolDescription.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often
toolDescription.placeholder: e.g. Work with your data in a Weaviate Cluster

embeddingBatchSize.description: Number of documents to embed in a single batch

tenant.description: Tenant Name. Collection must have been created with tenant support enabled.

textKey.description: The key in the document that contains the embedded text

skip_init_checks.description: Whether to skip init checks while instantiating the client

timeout_init.description: Number of timeout seconds for initial checks

timeout_insert.description: Number of timeout seconds for inserts

timeout_query.description: Number of timeout seconds for queries

clearStore.description: Whether to clear the Collection/Tenant before inserting new data

searchFilterJson.description: Filter pageContent or metadata using this filtering syntax

metadataKeys.description: Select the metadata to retrieve along the content

hybridQuery.description: Provide a query text to combine vector search with a keyword/text search

hybridExplainScore.description: Whether to show the score fused between hybrid and vector search explanation

fusionType.description: Select the fusion type for combining vector and keyword search results

autoCutLimit.description: Limit result groups by detecting sudden jumps in score

alpha.description: Change the relative weights of the keyword and vector components. 1.0 = pure vector, 0.0 = pure keyword.

queryProperties.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the query with optionally weighted values, e.g., "question^2,answer"

maxVectorDistance.description: Set the maximum allowable distance for the vector search component

prompt.description: Search prompt to retrieve matching documents from the vector store using similarity-based ranking

topK.description: Number of top results to fetch from vector store

includeDocumentMetadata.description: Whether or not to include document metadata

useReranker.description: Whether or not to rerank results
